name: HUGOTON ROYALTY TRUST
business: The Trust holds net profits interests in oil and natural gas properties, primarily gas-producing, located in the Hugoton area of Oklahoma and Kansas, the Anadarko Basin of Oklahoma, and the Green River Basin of Wyoming. The Trust receives net profits income from the sale of oil and gas produced from these underlying properties, which are operated by Mach (since April 30, 2025) and previously XTO Energy. The Trust's only cash requirement is distributions to unitholders, funded by net profits income after payment of Trust administration expenses.

exposures.sentence: All the underlying properties are currently owned by Mach. The underlying properties are predominantly gas-producing properties with established production histories in the Hugoton area of Oklahoma and Kansas, the Anadarko Basin of Oklahoma and the Green River Basin of Wyoming.

There is a focus by local, national and international regulatory bodies on greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions and sustainability... it is possible that operators of the underlying properties could face increases in operating costs in order to comply with sustainability or GHG emissions legislation, which costs could reduce net proceeds payable to the Trust and Trust distributions.
